phases.name: Write git_ops tests
phases.reasoning: Create git_ops.rs with AutoresearchGitOps struct definition, test helpers (setup_repo, write_and_commit), and all 11 tests: test_new_opens_repo, test_new_fails_on_non_repo, test_create_branch, test_create_branch_already_exists, test_commit, test_reset_to_last_keep, test_reset_without_keep_sha_errors, test_checkout_branch, test_checkout_nonexistent_branch, test_commit_updates_last_keep_sha, test_full_keep_discard_cycle. Add pub mod git_ops to mod.rs. Tests should compile but fail (red phase).

phases.name: Implement AutoresearchGitOps
phases.reasoning: Implement all methods on AutoresearchGitOps: new(), head_sha(), open_repo(), create_branch(), checkout_branch(), commit(), reset_to_last_keep(), last_keep_sha(). Use git2 crate directly with anyhow::Context on all operations. Track last_keep_sha across branch creation, checkout, and commit. All 11 tests must pass. Run cargo clippy clean.

phases.name: Write LoopGitOps trait impl tests
phases.reasoning: Add tests verifying AutoresearchGitOps implements LoopGitOps trait from loop_runner.rs. Test that the trait object can be used (Box<dyn LoopGitOps>). If trait uses &self, convert last_keep_sha to Mutex<Option<String>> for interior mutability and verify thread safety (Send + Sync bounds).

phases.name: Implement LoopGitOps trait
phases.reasoning: Implement LoopGitOps trait for AutoresearchGitOps. If trait uses &self, refactor last_keep_sha to use std::sync::Mutex<Option<String>> for interior mutability. Update all methods accordingly. Ensure Send + Sync. All existing tests plus new trait tests pass. cargo clippy clean. cargo build succeeds.
